# synARKa Intelligence
> The Indo-Pacific Sovereign Sense Engine. Multi-engine consensus intelligence across critical minerals, rare earths, geopolitics, defence, agriculture, logistics, infrastructure, national resources and markets — 72 hours before it becomes the headline. Sydney, Australia. Operating entity Artigellence Augmentation Aggregator, ABN 83 988 690 362, active since 2003.

## What synARKa is
- Calibrated, timestamped, falsifiable insights — "insight", never "prediction" (ACMA compliance, Australia)
- Three engines: Satellite (brokered SAR/LWIR tasking, NDA-tier providers) · Consensus-Simulation · Intelligence (multi-engine consensus across 8 reasoning engines)
- Four stages: SENSE → SIMULATE → VERIFY → DELIVER
- Public resolved ledger with misses reported in full: 5 of 6 May-2026 insights resolved correct
- Phase 2 (in active build, NOT live today): automated SHA-256 hashing, OpenTimestamps anchoring, Brier scoring, psychometric agent swarms

## The receipts (May 2026, resolved 15 + 31 May)
- ASX Rare-Earths Offtake Call — 65% published conviction — "One ASX RE miner announces a US-aligned offtake by 31 May." Arafura × Traxys signed 13 May. Resolved correct.
- The Gold Price Floor — 88% conviction, highest on ledger — "XAU holds above US$3,200 through 31 May." Gold ran to ~US$4,485. Resolved correct.
- Materials over Financials — 62% conviction — "XMJ outperforms XFJ through 31 May." Materials +10.51%, best ASX sector. Resolved correct.
- Hormuz → AUD Cascade — 25% conviction, lowest on ledger, published anyway — falsification trigger fired exactly as written. Published miss, reported in full.
- A ledger that hides its misses is not a ledger. Full record: https://insights.synarka.pro

## Domain surfaces
Five self-explanatory domain tabs plus a live signal tab and the resolved ledger:
Critical Minerals · Geopolitics / Government · Defence & Sovereignty · Agriculture · Infrastructure & Resources · LIVE · Insights Ledger

## Entry ladder
- First Insight — free, one corridor question, no card, direct from the founder
- 72-Hour Brief — A$500, one corridor question
- Site Baseline Audit — A$3,500–7,500 one-time, credits toward SiteWatch
- SiteWatch — from A$1,490/mo per site, continuous monitoring on an audited asset
- Sovereign Retainer — eight protocols from Free to Consultancy

## Eight standing protocols (AUD, month-to-month, no lock-in)
- Free · Public — A$0/mo — public ledger, weekly digest
- Watch · Test — A$99/mo — one domain, weekly brief
- Operator — A$1,500/mo — all domains, 48hr alerts
- Pro — A$5,000/mo — daily dispatches, founder direct line, 24hr SLA
- Enterprise — A$15K+/mo — sovereign cadence, multi-corridor, NDA, 12hr SLA
- Tailored · Sovereign — POA — bespoke architecture, 30-min discovery call required
- Audit · One-time — A$5K–15K +GST — diagnostic baseline on a named site or corridor
- Consultancy · Bespoke — A$3,000–25,000/project — M&A risk, tender intelligence, advisory

## Honesty discipline
Research & educational content only. Not financial, legal or investment advice. synARKa Intelligence is not an AFS licensee. A ledger that hides its misses is not a ledger.
